## About
WebTools is a free collection of 1588 tools (3160+ bilingual pages) of browser-based developer, design, PDF, and productivity tools. No signup, no backend, everything runs locally in your browser. Your data never leaves your device. All tools are pure HTML/JS with zero server dependencies. Available in English and Chinese (every tool has both language versions). Active development since 2025 with continuous weekly updates.

## Tools List

- **YAML转Properties - 免费在线YAML转Properties工具，将YAML配置文件转换为Java Properties格式，支持嵌套键展开、拖拽文件、示例数据，纯前端本地处理。**: /yaml-to-properties/ | English: /en/yaml-to-properties/
- **Properties转YAML - 免费在线Properties转YAML工具，将Java Properties配置文件转换为YAML格式，支持点分隔键还原嵌套、拖拽文件、示例数据，纯前端本地处理。**: /properties-to-yaml/ | English: /en/properties-to-yaml/
